mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mbr_member_consent ( tenant_id, member_id, consent_type, granted, version, granted_at, revoked_at, channel, collected_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{c.tenantId}, #{c.memberId}, #{c.consentType}, #{c.granted}, #{c.version}, CASE WHEN #{c.granted} = true THEN COALESCE(#{c.grantedAt}, now()) ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN #{c.granted} = false THEN COALESCE(#{c.revokedAt}, now()) ELSE NULL END, #{c.channel}, #{c.collectedBy}, now() )
